history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: One centered profile-style graphic and text over a red, patterned background make up the main focus of the image.

Main Subject:
At the center is a circular avatar graphic containing an illustration of a person with short, light-colored hair, surrounded by a ring filled with small UI-like icons and text. Below it, large headline text reads “SELAMAT JALAN,” followed by “Sampai Jumpa Kembali,” then a smaller line that reads “Kayz x Hutao || Assisten [3].” Near the bottom center is a rounded pill-shaped button or label that reads “20 Left.”

Setting:
The image is a static, graphic design screen with a dark red theme and an anime-like collage background. The background appears to be an illustrated scene with overlapping shapes and light bokeh-like circles, under a semi-transparent red overlay; no outdoor or time-of-day information is visible.

Visual Details:
The color palette is dominated by deep reds and dark maroons, with lighter pinkish-red typography. The background shows faint, layered line-art and character-like silhouettes, with circular highlights scattered across it. The composition is centered and symmetrical: the circular avatar at the top center, stacked text lines beneath it, and a single rounded button below. A faint grid or overlay pattern and subtle geometric corner framing appear around the edges.

Visible Text:
SELAMAT JALAN
Sampai Jumpa Kembali
Kayz x Hutao || Assisten [3]
20 Left

Practical Summary:
The image shows a red-themed graphic screen with a circular avatar and several centered text lines. It also includes a rounded “20 Left” label beneath the title text.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

SELAMAT JALAN  
Sampai Jumpa Kembali  
Kayz x Hutoa II Assisten [3]  

20 Left

# Structured Version

## Header
- **SELAMAT JALAN**

## Subtitle
- **Sampai Jumpa Kembali**

## Username/Title
- **Kayz x Hutoa II Assisten [3]**

## Remaining
- **20 Left**

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
Gambar ini menampilkan desain grafis dengan nuansa anime. Di bagian tengah atas terdapat lingkaran yang berisi ilustrasi karakter anime wanita yang mengenakan hoodie abu-abu. Di sekeliling karakter tersebut terdapat elemen-elemen seperti ikon aplikasi, teks seperti "welcome to", "new", "add your friends", dan logo "KAYZ AI". Di bawah lingkaran tersebut terdapat teks besar berwarna merah muda bertuliskan "SELAMAT JALAN", diikuti dengan teks "Sampai Jumpa Kembali" dan "Kayz x Hutao || Assisten [3]". Di bawahnya lagi terdapat tombol oval berwarna merah muda dengan tulisan "20 Left". Latar belakang gambar didominasi warna merah tua dengan pola kisi-kisi halus dan siluet karakter anime lainnya yang samar. Keseluruhan desain ini bersifat visual dan tidak mengandung konten NSFW.
